description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing libstdc++-4.9-dev, g++, and updating cabal. Define three test jobs named test:7.10, test:7.8, and test:8.0, each using the corresponding haskell Docker image (haskell:7.10, haskell:7.8, haskell:8.0) and running in the test stage. Each job should execute the commands: cabal install --enable-test --only-dep -j, cabal build, and cabal test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
